SEARCH
Package edu.cnm.deepdive.seesomethingabq.controller

Class ManagerIssueTypeController

java.lang.Object
edu.cnm.deepdive.seesomethingabq.controller.ManagerIssueTypeController
@RestController @RequestMapping("/manager/issue-types") public class ManagerIssueTypeController extends Object
REST controller exposing manager-only issue type administration endpoints.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    ManagerIssueTypeController(IssueTypeService service)
    Creates a controller exposing manager-only issue type administration operations.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    ResponseEntity<IssueType>
    createIssueType(IssueType newIssueType)
    Creates a new issue type.
    void
    deleteUnusedIssueType(String issueTypeTag)
    Deletes an issue type if it is not currently referenced by any reports.
    IssueType
    getIssueType(String issueTypeTag)
    Returns a single issue type by tag.
    IssueType
    updateIssueTypeDescription(String issueTypeTag, String newIssueTypeDescription)
    Updates the description of an issue type.

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

  • Constructor Details

    • ManagerIssueTypeController

      @Autowired public ManagerIssueTypeController(IssueTypeService service)
      Creates a controller exposing manager-only issue type administration operations.
      Parameters:
      service - issue type service.

  • Method Details

    • getIssueType

      @GetMapping(path="/{issueTypeTag}", produces="application/json") public IssueType getIssueType(@PathVariable String issueTypeTag)
      Returns a single issue type by tag.
      Parameters:
      issueTypeTag - issue type tag.
      Returns:
      issue type entity.

    • createIssueType

      @PostMapping(consumes="application/json") public ResponseEntity<IssueType> createIssueType(@RequestBody IssueType newIssueType)
      Creates a new issue type.
      Parameters:
      newIssueType - issue type to create.
      Returns:
      response containing the created entity and a Location header.

    • updateIssueTypeDescription

      @PatchMapping(path="/{issueTypeTag}", consumes="application/json") public IssueType updateIssueTypeDescription(@PathVariable String issueTypeTag, @RequestBody String newIssueTypeDescription)
      Updates the description of an issue type.
      Parameters:
      issueTypeTag - issue type tag.
      newIssueTypeDescription - new description payload.
      Returns:
      updated issue type.

    • deleteUnusedIssueType

      @DeleteMapping(path="/{issueTypeTag}") @ResponseStatus(NO_CONTENT) public void deleteUnusedIssueType(@PathVariable String issueTypeTag)
      Deletes an issue type if it is not currently referenced by any reports.
      Parameters:
      issueTypeTag - issue type tag.
